title: Open Fireplaces | Heat & Glo
description: Add warmth, comfort and ambiance with our lineup of gas, electric and wood fireplaces, inserts and log sets.

h2: Open hearth fireplaces feature an astounding design and stunning display – with no glass to interrupt the view. Immerse yourself in an open-hearth experience, enriching your interaction with the fire itself and the people gathered around it. Browse a range of open wood or gas fireplaces that combine a timeless masonry aesthetic with innovative technology.

paragraphs: Open hearth fireplaces feature an astounding design and stunning display – with no glass to interrupt the view. Immerse yourself in an open-hearth experience, enriching your interaction with the fire itself and the people gathered around it. Browse a range of open wood or gas fireplaces that combine a timeless masonry aesthetic with innovative technology.

With the biggest viewing area in its class – up to 50” wide – the Rutherford open fireplace commands attention. Enjoy the crackle of a real wood fire thanks to the glass-free design and the look of a site-built masonry fireplace without the price tag. Gas log sets are also available to add to this fireplace, offering an alternative option to enjoy the boldness of an open flame with the convenience of gas. Note: not available in Canada.

Make a statement in your outdoor oasis as you enjoy the experience of a large, open hearth outdoor fireplace. The Castlewood, one of our most impressive wood-burning fireplaces, combines a stunning 38-inch-tall firebox – with no glass to enhance the views and warmth – and safety-ensured brick construction.

Gather with family and friends around the crackle and aroma of a blazing fire, as you take the chill off evenings and extend the outdoor season. The Cottagewood outdoor fireplace offers an open-hearth experience, enriching your connection to the fire itself and the people around it.

Evoke an open-hearth experience so real, friends may ask to add another log to the fire. We pioneered the open gas fireplace with a large, glass-free view so you get the ultimate combination of authenticity and innovation. Mild heat settings allow for openness without feeling overheated, and you can even stream your tunes or the crackling of a fire through built-in Bluetooth speakers. Not available in Canada.

The Villawood outdoor open fireplace provides that snap and crackle you love, with the Heat & Glo quality you depend on. Its masonry look and open-hearth design enhances any deck, patio, or outdoor kitchen, and promises an inviting presence to all those who gather near the open-flame fireplace.

Bring the ambiance of a crackling open hearth into your home. The Exclaim open fireplace is a beautiful, wood-burning option. The spacious viewing area – up to 50” – is designed without glass so you can enjoy real fireside authenticity. Gas log sets are also available to add to the Exclaim fireplace if you’re looking for a more consistent burn and streamlined setup. Complete the open fireplace look with your choice of herringbone or traditional brick interior. Note: 50” not available in Canada.
Whether you're updating your current fireplace or adding one to your home, our authorized dealers can show you a range of options that fit your style and budget.

Please refer to the owner’s/installation manual for complete requirements, specifications, testing and listing information. The heat output as well as the appearance of your unit in your specific application—including the flame, embers and overall product appearance—may vary for a variety of reasons from the data and images presented. Product specifications and pricing are subject to change without notice, and installation must adhere strictly to instructions shipped with product. Hearth & Home Technologies reserves the right to update units periodically. If you need help in determining the product that best suits your needs, please see your local authorized dealer.
